meta.title: Self Loading Concrete Mixer Manufacturer
meta.description: Self-loading concrete mixers engineered and manufactured in China for global construction projects.

footer.tagline: Self-loading concrete mixer solutions engineered for the world.

home.intro: Self-loading concrete mixers engineered for demanding jobsites. One machine. One operator. Total control.
home.processText: Load, weigh, mix, transport and discharge concrete directly on site—reducing labor and keeping every project moving.

features.title: Efficient Output
features.text: Integrated production designed to shorten every concrete cycle.

features.title: Factory Built
features.text: Controlled manufacturing, testing and configurable production.

features.title: Jobsite Ready
features.text: Heavy-duty systems developed for demanding terrain and climates.

features.title: Global Support
features.text: Export coordination, technical guidance and spare parts support.

home.factoryText: From steel fabrication to final inspection, every machine is built under one roof for quality you can verify.
home.casesText: Built for contractors across infrastructure, mining, municipal and remote construction projects.

products.title: BUILT FOR EVERY JOBSITE.
products.description: Choose the output, mobility and configuration your operation demands.

detail.description: Balanced output, all-terrain mobility and one-operator control for demanding construction work.
detail.title: BUILT AROUND THE WORK.
detail.text: Integrated loading, weighing, mixing and discharge reduce the equipment and labor required on site.

features.title: Self Loading System
features.text: Hydraulic bucket designed for fast material handling.

features.title: Integrated Mixing
features.text: Consistent mixing and controlled discharge from the cab.

features.title: Off-road Mobility
features.text: Purpose-built for uneven access and remote jobsites.

factory.title: ENGINEERING UNDER ONE ROOF.
factory.description: A coordinated production environment covering equipment display, component preparation, fabrication, assembly and inspection.
factory.overviewText: Built with control at every stage.
factory.processText: Real factory materials show equipment display, fabrication, assembly and organized parts preparation.

sections.title: Factory & equipment yard
sections.text: A dedicated factory site with multiple mixer capacities available for inspection.

sections.title: Fabrication capability
sections.text: Organized fabrication areas support structural production and preparation.

sections.title: Assembly workshop
sections.text: Mechanical, hydraulic and electrical systems are integrated indoors.

sections.title: Parts organization
sections.text: Organized components support production and after-sales preparation.

videos.title: MACHINES IN MOTION.
videos.description: Product operation, jobsite performance and manufacturing highlights.
videos.note: The remaining raw videos are cataloged by model and will be published after web compression.

downloads.title: THE DETAILS YOU NEED.
downloads.description: Product brochures, specification sheets and support documents.
